title: Oprah Announces Her Second Pick for Oprah's Book Club 2.0
text:
[Books](https://www.oprah.com/app/books.html)

# Oprah Announces Her Second Pick for Oprah's Book Club 2.0

This masterful debut novel was so astonishing that Oprah had to share it with the world. Watch to find out what Oprah loved so much about Ayana Mathis' _The Twelve Tribes of Hattie_ .  
  
**Learn more about how you can participate in [Oprah's Book Club 2.0](https://www.oprah.com/packages/oprahs-book-club-2.html) .**

Published 12/04/2012
